From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Dinosaur Annex Music Ensemble** is a contemporary chamber music ensemble based in [Boston](/wiki/Boston "Boston"), [Massachusetts](/wiki/Massachusetts "Massachusetts"). The group was founded in 1975 by composers [Scott Wheeler](/wiki/Scott_Wheeler_(composer) "Scott Wheeler (composer)"), Rodney Lister, and [Ezra Sims](/wiki/Ezra_Sims "Ezra Sims") as the concert-giving “annex” of New England Dinosaur Dance Theater. The ensemble has been independently incorporated since 1977.

The ensemble is currently directed by Co-Artistic Directors Hubert Ho and Felicia Chen. Recent directors include Wheeler, Sue-Ellen Hershman-Tcherepnin, [Yu-Hui Chang](/wiki/Yu-Hui_Chang "Yu-Hui Chang"), and Emily Koh. Members include Donald Berman, piano; Gabriela Diaz, violin; Anne Black, viola/violin; Rafael Popper-Keizer, cello; Diane Heffner, clarinets/sax; Hershman-Tcherepnin, flute; Katherine V. Matasy, clarinets/sax/accordion; and Robert Schulz, percussion.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The group's core musicians perform regularly with the [Boston Symphony](/wiki/Boston_Symphony "Boston Symphony"), [Boston Pops](/wiki/Boston_Pops "Boston Pops"), [Boston Lyric Opera](/wiki/Boston_Lyric_Opera "Boston Lyric Opera"), [Boston Ballet](/wiki/Boston_Ballet "Boston Ballet"), [Handel and Haydn](/wiki/Handel_and_Haydn_Society "Handel and Haydn Society"), [Pro Arte Chamber Orchestra](/wiki/Pro_Arte_Chamber_Orchestra "Pro Arte Chamber Orchestra"), and in Boston's Broadway theater productions. Notable guest performers and conductors include [Gunther Schuller](/wiki/Gunther_Schuller "Gunther Schuller"), [Lorraine Hunt](/wiki/Lorraine_Hunt "Lorraine Hunt"), [John Harbison](/wiki/John_Harbison "John Harbison"), [D'Anna Fortunato](/wiki/D%27Anna_Fortunato "D'Anna Fortunato"), [Pamela Dellal](/wiki/Pamela_Dellal "Pamela Dellal"), and [Pascal Verrot](/wiki/Pascal_Verrot "Pascal Verrot").

Dinosaur Annex Music Ensemble has commissioned works by many composers, including Mark Berger, [Martin Boykan](/wiki/Martin_Boykan "Martin Boykan"), Dana Brayton, Jeffery Brooks, Richard Busch, Robert Ceely, [Shih-Hui Chen](/wiki/Shih-Hui_Chen "Shih-Hui Chen"), Tamar Diesendruck, Tom Flaherty, [Lee Hyla](/wiki/Lee_Hyla "Lee Hyla"), [David Lang](/wiki/David_Lang_(composer) "David Lang (composer)"), [Arthur Levering](/wiki/Arthur_Levering "Arthur Levering"), [Ruth Lomon](/wiki/Ruth_Lomon "Ruth Lomon"), [Lansing McLoskey](/wiki/Lansing_McLoskey "Lansing McLoskey"), [John McDonald](/w/index.php?title=John_McDonald_(composer)&action=edit&redlink=1 "John McDonald (composer) (page does not exist)"), Malcolm Peyton, [David Rakowski](/wiki/David_Rakowski "David Rakowski"), [Laurie San Martin](/wiki/Laurie_San_Martin "Laurie San Martin"), James Russel Smith, [Kurt Stallmann](/wiki/Kurt_Stallmann "Kurt Stallmann"), [Lewis Spratlan](/wiki/Lewis_Spratlan "Lewis Spratlan"), Peter Van Zandt Lane, Donald Wheelock, and [Evan Ziporyn](/wiki/Evan_Ziporyn "Evan Ziporyn").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Discography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Dinosaur_Annex_Music_Ensemble&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Discography")]

* [Peter Homans, A Prague Spring, 2007 (MMC)](https://web.archive.org/web/20080920151708/http://www.mmcrecordings.com/detail.asp?ID=177)
* [Donald Martino, Quintino, 2007 (Navona)](http://www.naxosdirect.com/MARTINO-D-Fantasies-and-Impromptus--Piano-Trio--Serenata-Concertante--PEYTON-M-Elegy--HOMANS-P-Quintino-Means-Wheeler/title/NV5811/)
* [Martin Boykan, Piano Trio no. 2, 1999 (CRI)](http://www.newworldrecords.org/album.cgi?rm=view&album_id=17620)
* [Martin Boykan, Flume, 2002 (CRI)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00006IZMR)
* Lee Hyla, String Trio, 1983 (CRI)
* [Ian Krouse, Tientos, 1997 (Koch International)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00003XB7W)
* [Arthur Levering, Still Raining, Still Dreaming, 2005 (New World)](http://www.newworldrecords.org/album.cgi?rm=view&album_id=81783)
* [Arthur Levering, School of Velocity, 1994 (CRI)](http://www.newworldrecords.org/album.cgi?rm=view&album_id=17592)
* [Scott Lindroth, Human Gestures, 1998 (CRI)](http://www.newworldrecords.org/album.cgi?rm=view&album_id=17588)
* [David Liptak, Ancient Songs, 2004 (Bridge)](https://web.archive.org/web/20100308070328/http://bridgerecords.com/pages/catalog/9167.htm)
* [Malcolm Peyton, Songs from T. Sturge Moore (Centuar)](http://www.centaurrecords.com/search_engine.php?session=230243&category=all_categories&offset=5&search_string=2182)
* [Ezra Sims, Come Away, 1986 (CRI)](http://www.newworldrecords.org/album.cgi?rm=view&album_id=17362)
* [Ezra Sims, Quintet for Clarinet and Strings, 1991 (CRI)](http://www.newworldrecords.org/album.cgi?rm=view&album_id=17426)
* [Robert Sirota, Seven Pocassos, 1988 (Capstone)](http://www.capstonerecords.org/CPS-8616.html)
* Dinosaur Annex: Thirty Years of Adventure, 1975–2005
